description: A reproduction of an early-20th-century color illustration. The painterly image shows a crowd of people in old-fashioned coats, shawls and hats gathered on the deck of a steamship arriving in New York harbor, with the Statue of Liberty in the misty background and a lifeboat at upper right. The scene is in muted period tones (browns, reds, blues, cream sky). Bold display text at the top, in red, reads 'Remember Your First Thrill of AMERICAN LIBERTY'. A cream banner across the bottom carries, in large blue and red letters, 'SAFEGUARD AMERICANISM' and below it 'USCIS.GOV/JOIN'. The tweet text reads 'Decide what our nation will become.'
notable_text: Remember Your First Thrill of AMERICAN LIBERTY; SAFEGUARD AMERICANISM; USCIS.GOV/JOIN
